last_action: Sprint 1 BUILD_AGENT iteration 2: Fixed DataTable hover:bg-slate-50/80 dark mode bug (flashed white on hover). Added scanner #13 + regression test. 285 theme audit tests pass, 1323 pytest pass, 103 vitest pass.
